topics.title: Artie's Sports Betting Wins and Jerky Incident
topics.summary: The studio discusses Artie's successful sports betting wins, his work habits as a host, and a graphic recording of Richard Christie vomiting after eating beef jerky.

topics.title: Film Festival Updates and Listener Call-ins
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming films for a festival, technical adjustments to the broadcast equipment, and various listener messages regarding celebrity news and personal grievances.

topics.title: Media Harassment and Sports Betting
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the rewards of sports betting, an encounter with a persistent photographer in Manhattan, and the distinction between natural beauty and professional modeling.

topics.title: Celebrity Media Appearances and Music Industry Rumors
topics.summary: The studio discusses various celebrity media appearances, including a discussion on the show "Surreal Life," rumors regarding Prince appearing on "American Idol," and a review of local music performances.

topics.title: Guitar Ownership and Musical Influences
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion about the acquisition of new musical equipment, the importance of taking professional lessons, and a comparison between various rock vocalists.

topics.title: Media and Weight Loss Discussion
topics.summary: The studio explores the professional fallout of media personalities at CBS, the growth of satellite radio platforms, and a guest's physical transformation after losing weight.

topics.title: Weight Loss Progress and Police Officer Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a woman discussing her weight loss journey and physical appearance before transitioning to an interview with a police officer regarding his career and marriage.

topics.title: Nirvana Legacy and Political Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the commercialization of Nirvana's image, the political maneuvers of Jerry Falwell and John McCain, and a prank involving an impersonator.

topics.title: Howard Stern Film Festival Preparations
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming film festival entries, including a stop-motion animation about vegetables and various low-budget projects from contributors.

topics.title: Media Legal Tactics and Industry Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio discusses the shift in media corporate behavior toward litigation, the construction of legal cases against uncooperative figures, and the internal dynamics of radio personalities.

topics.title: Radio Management and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The show critiques the management of a radio personality's contract, discusses media figures like Katie Couric, and features a musical performance by Steve Vai.

topics.title: Hostility Toward Dr. Armstrong
topics.summary: The studio features a heated exchange regarding the appearance and professional demeanor of a therapist named Dr. Armstrong.

topics.title: Radio Show Segment and Guest Previews
topics.summary: The studio coordinates upcoming guest appearances, discusses a local coyote incident, and previews segments regarding celebrity news and listener interactions.

topics.title: Medical Breakthroughs and Cultural News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the medical advancement of lab-grown bladders, the evolving role of cell phones in modern society, the legal proceedings against a 9/11 conspirator, and various entertainment news items.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of entertainment topics including celebrity casting rumors, film scenes from The Godfather, news regarding Tom DeLay, and updates on various actors' upcoming projects.
